red_pre_match_warmup.name: Pre-Match Warmup
red_pre_match_warmup.body: Gain 1 attack. Schedule: At the start of next turn, gain 2 attack.

red_extra_training_plan.name: Extra Training Plan
red_extra_training_plan.body: Draw 1 card. Schedule: At the start of next turn, gain 2 attack.

blue_all_night_study.name: All-Night Study
blue_all_night_study.body: Gain 2 resources. Schedule: At the start of next turn, draw 2 cards.

white_duty_student.name: Duty Student
white_duty_student.body: [Guard Venue] Opponents must destroy this before attacking your player or other venues. Activate: Gain 1 block.

white_discipline_warning.name: Discipline Warning
white_discipline_warning.body: Opponent discards 1 card at the start of their next turn. Gain 2 block.

white_dorm_inspection.name: Dorm Inspection
white_dorm_inspection.body: Opponent discards 2 cards at the start of their next turn. Gain 1 block.

white_student_affairs_talk.name: Student Affairs Talk
white_student_affairs_talk.body: Opponent discards 3 cards at the start of their next turn. Gain 3 block.

neutral_finals_week.name: Finals Week
neutral_finals_week.body: Pressure strikes! Give opponent 2 Pressure. You also get 1 Pressure.

green_used_book_recycle.name: Used Book Recycle
green_used_book_recycle.body: Trash up to 1 card from your hand or discard. Gain 2 resources.

blue_draft_simulation.name: Draft Simulation
blue_draft_simulation.body: Scry 3: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may discard 1. Put the rest back in order. Then gain 1 resource.

green_anniversary_sponsor.name: Anniversary Sponsor
green_anniversary_sponsor.body: Gain 1 resource. Then gain a card from the market costing up to 4 for free (put it in your discard).

red_cheer_combo.name: Cheer Combo
red_cheer_combo.body: Gain 1 attack. Choose an opponent venue and deal 2 durability damage to it.
